name: parley
description: Parley — a transport-agnostic MCP seam for messages, context sharing, and task hand-off between humans, chat bots, and coding agents. One pluggable interface; runs on local SQLite, Redis, Matrix, or NATS. Bridges Claude chat ↔ Claude Code via native channels.

scripts.test:loopback: npm run build && vitest run examples/fakechat-loopback
